$comment: Registry crossfeed queue (SNR_SPEC 6, SNR_PLAN 7.3). Written by finalize-sweep from attested crossfeed facts on scored items; consumed by the weekly maintain-registry run. Every entry either lands in the registry (with the item's URL as source), is rejected with a reason, or is queued for Florian; entries are removed only when consumed.
